message.content: {"analysis":"oligotm and primer3 are not installed. I need to install primer3 which contains oligotm. Then I need to analyze the sequences to design Golden Gate primers.","plan":"Install primer3 package, then analyze sequences to understand the assembly design.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq primer3 2>&1 | tail -5\n","duration":30.0},{"keystrokes":"which oligotm\n","duration":0.1}]}
